summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MDM Mapping Tool Phase 3: AI-Powered Matching feature. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed AI Match button visibility logic, confirmation dialog, and results refresh work correctly. AI matching uses real GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ai-matching/status - returns {available: true, model: 'gpt-5.2'}
Backend: POST /api/ai-matching/preview - returns unmapped count and sample values
Backend: POST /api/ai-matching/preview - returns 404 for non-existent batch
Backend: POST /api/ai-matching/preview - returns 0 count for batch with no unmapped
Backend: POST /api/ai-matching/run - returns 404 for non-existent batch
Backend: POST /api/ai-matching/run - returns success with 0 matched for batch with no unmapped
Backend: POST /api/ai-matching/run - processes unmapped values through GPT-5.2
Backend: AI matching creates audit log entry with model='gpt-5.2'
Backend: Filter by match_type=ai works correctly
Backend: Batch stats remain consistent after AI matching
Backend: AI results include confidence scores and reasoning
Frontend: Review Workbench shows 'AI Match' button (purple, brain icon) when batch has unmapped values
Frontend: AI Match button is hidden when no unmapped values exist
Frontend: Clicking AI Match shows confirmation dialog with value count and samples
Frontend: Confirmation dialog shows 'AI-Powered Matching' title with brain icon
Frontend: Dialog mentions 'GPT-5.2' and shows sample values
Frontend: Confirmation dialog has Cancel and 'Run AI Matching' buttons
Frontend: After AI runs, toast notification shows results (auto/review/still unmapped)
Frontend: 'AI' option available in match type filter dropdown
Frontend: Keyword Rules page still accessible from sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding description prop

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components and workflows functioning correctly)

test_credentials: No authentication required. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured in backend .env
seed_data_creation: Used existing batches: priority batch (2e6d7dfb) with 5 unmapped values, ward batch (119253d7) with 0 unmapped, disposition batch (fdd0d88b) with 0 unmapped
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Matching feature (Phase 3) fully tested. Backend endpoints for GET /api/ai-matching/status, POST /api/ai-matching/preview, POST /api/ai-matching/run all working. Frontend shows AI Match button only when batch has unmapped values, confirmation dialog with sample values, and toast notification after AI runs. AI uses real GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library. Note: Priority batch values (Critical, High, Medium, Low, Routine) don't match healthcare disposition standards, so AI correctly returns null matches for those. Ward batch has one AI-matched result (Maternity -> Labor and Delivery) from previous testing.
notes: The AI matching correctly returns null/no matches for priority values (Critical, High, Medium, Low, Routine) because they don't correspond to healthcare disposition standards in the system. This is expected behavior as documented in the test request. The AI integration is working correctly - it processes values through GPT-5.2 and returns appropriate confidence scores when matches are found.
